sourceMovie.title: American History X
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: American History X works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Straight Outta Compton
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If American History X clicked for you, Straight Outta Compton (2015) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after American History X?
faq.answer: Try Straight Outta Compton, Out of the Furnace, The Color Purple—each shares DNA with American History X while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is American History X?
faq.answer: American History X (1998) is best described as Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is American History X worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 8.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
